rationale: The cited paper appears in grouped references when the authors broadly position their contribution within visual marketing aesthetics research, and it is not singled out for a specific role. The citing paper does not draw hypotheses, mechanisms, measures, or empirical design choices from Cian et al. (2014). Its core theorizing and tests are instead built on slow-motion intentionality and attribution literatures. This indicates a background/positioning mention rather than a substantive directional dependence.
